MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL B. BUTTERFIELD for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is off calendar and dissolved. Case was removed from the Early Settlement Program. Proceedings not reported. (212)
